title: code-review --format json envelope (schema_version 1)
description: The stdout document of a `code-review --format json` run. One shape covers all three run types: single-model (the default), panel (--models: `model` is null, `models`/`per_model`/per-finding `found_by` appear), and chunked (--chunk: `chunks`/`per_chunk`/per-finding `chunk` appear). Fields not listed here may be added within schema_version 1 without notice (validation is intentionally open); breaking changes bump schema_version and are always called out in CHANGELOG.md.

model.description: The reviewing model slug; null for panel runs (see `models`).

models.description: Panel runs only: the resolved model slugs in CLI order.

summary.description: The model's change/codebase summary; null when absent or for panel/chunked documents (which have no single summary).

clean.description: True when the model explicitly reported no issues. An empty `findings` list with clean=false means findings were filtered (--min-severity) or the parse failed -- check `parse_ok`.

usage.description: Token usage; summed across models/chunks for panel/chunked runs. Null when the provider reported none.

truncated.description: True when output hit the max_tokens ceiling (any model/chunk for panel/chunked runs) -- the review may be incomplete.

parse_ok.description: False when the model's markdown could not be parsed into findings; the raw output is then embedded (top-level `raw`, or per model/chunk). Exit code stays 0 -- callers branch on this field.

problems.description: Non-fatal parse anomalies, prefixed with the model/chunk for panel/chunked runs.

raw.description: Single-model runs only, and only when parse_ok is false: the model's verbatim markdown.

resolved.description: --baseline runs only: baseline findings nothing in this round matched (prior-round finding objects, verbatim).

per_model.description: Panel runs only: one entry per model in CLI order, including failed models.

chunks.description: Chunked runs only: how many chunks the payload split into.

per_chunk.description: Chunked runs only: one entry per chunk in execution order.

file.description: Forward-slash path; null when the finding appeared before any file heading.

line.description: 1-indexed; null when the model omitted it (or wrote a 0, a diff-position artifact).

severity.description: CRITICAL | HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW, or UNKNOWN when unparseable (UNKNOWN findings are never dropped by --min-severity).

suggestion.description: The proposed-fix code block, when the model supplied one. Review like any untrusted patch before applying.

fingerprint.description: sha1(file|severity|normalized_title)[:12] -- stable across line drift; used by --baseline matching.

found_by.description: Panel runs only: which models reported this (consensus) finding. 1 is the empirical norm; >1 is a rare, high-precision signal.

chunk.description: Chunked runs only: which chunk produced this finding.

error.description: The typed error for a failed model (its fields mirror the ERROR: stderr contract); null on success.

raw.description: Only when this model's parse failed: its verbatim markdown.
Only when this chunk's parse failed: its verbatim markdown.
